text: Bitcoin is holding steady near $63k while Ethereum has softened slightly more, suggesting traders are rotating toward the larger cap despite broad market hesitation. Extreme Fear sentiment (14) with Bitcoin dominance climbing to 56.1% indicates risk-off positioning, though the modest 24-hour declines and $62B volume suggest this is consolidation rather than panic selling. The lack of momentum across alts—SOL down 1%, BNB flat—reinforces a cautious mood where capital is bunching around the majors while sentiment remains deeply pessimistic.
